name: TTCalc
description: Free TikTok Shop seller tools - fee calculator, profit calculator, and platform comparison. Independent, no signup, no tracking.

tools.name: TikTok Shop Fee Calculator
tools.description: Calculate the full TikTok Shop fee stack: 6% referral, $0.30 transaction, FBT fulfillment, creator commissions, refund administration.

tools.name: TikTok Shop Profit Calculator
tools.description: Model net profit per unit after all TikTok fees, COGS, shipping, ad spend, creator commissions, and returns.

tools.name: TikTok vs Amazon FBA
tools.description: Side-by-side comparison of TikTok Shop and Amazon FBA fees and profit at the same price point.
